title: DeepSeek-V4-Flash means LLM steering is interesting again
content: DeepSeek-V4-Flash means LLM steering is interesting again
author: Brajeshwar
title_ja: DeepSeek-V4-Flashにより、LLMの制御が再び面白くなった

title: My Favorite Bugs: Invalid Surrogate Pairs
content: My Favorite Bugs: Invalid Surrogate Pairs
author: meysamazad
title_ja: 私のお気に入りのバグ：無効なサロゲートペア

title: EntityBench: Towards Entity-Consistent Long-Range Multi-Shot Video Generation
content:
EntityBench: Towards Entity-Consistent Long-Range Multi-Shot Video Generation
Multi-shot video generation extends single-shot generation to coherent visual narratives, yet maintaining consistent characters, objects, and locations across shots remains a challenge over long sequences. Existing evaluations typically use independently generated prompt sets with limited entity cov
author: Ruozhen He, Meng Wei, Ziyan Yang
arxiv_summary: Multi-shot video generation extends single-shot generation to coherent visual narratives, yet maintaining consistent characters, objects, and locations across shots remains a challenge over long sequences. Existing evaluations typically use independently generated prompt sets with limited entity cov
title_ja: EntityBench: エンティティ一貫性のある長尺マルチショット動画生成に向けて
arxiv_summary_ja: マルチショット動画生成は、シングルショット生成を拡張して一貫性のある視覚的物語を作成しますが、長いシーケンスにわたってキャラクター、オブジェクト、および場所の一貫性を維持することは依然として課題です。既存の評価は通常、エンティティのカバー範囲が限られた、個別に生成されたプロンプトセットを使用しています。

title: ATLAS: Agentic or Latent Visual Reasoning? One Word is Enough for Both
content:
ATLAS: Agentic or Latent Visual Reasoning? One Word is Enough for Both
Visual reasoning, often interleaved with intermediate visual states, has emerged as a promising direction in the field. A straightforward approach is to directly generate images via unified models during reasoning, but this is computationally expensive and architecturally non-trivial. Recent alterna
author: Ziyu Guo, Rain Liu, Xinyan Chen
arxiv_summary: Visual reasoning, often interleaved with intermediate visual states, has emerged as a promising direction in the field. A straightforward approach is to directly generate images via unified models during reasoning, but this is computationally expensive and architecturally non-trivial. Recent alterna
title_ja: ATLAS: エージェント的推論か潜在的視覚推論か？どちらにも一言で対応
arxiv_summary_ja: 中間視覚状態がしばしば挟まれる視覚推論は、この分野で有望な方向性として浮上しています。推論中に統一モデルを介して直接画像を生成する単純なアプローチもありますが、これは計算コストが高く、アーキテクチャ的に複雑です。最近の代替手段としては、

title: FutureSim: Replaying World Events to Evaluate Adaptive Agents
content:
FutureSim: Replaying World Events to Evaluate Adaptive Agents
AI agents are being increasingly deployed in dynamic, open-ended environments that require adapting to new information as it arrives. To efficiently measure this capability for realistic use-cases, we propose building grounded simulations that replay real-world events in the order they occurred. We
author: Shashwat Goel, Nikhil Chandak, Arvindh Arun
arxiv_summary: AI agents are being increasingly deployed in dynamic, open-ended environments that require adapting to new information as it arrives. To efficiently measure this capability for realistic use-cases, we propose building grounded simulations that replay real-world events in the order they occurred. We
title_ja: FutureSim: 適応型エージェントを評価するために世界イベントを再生する
arxiv_summary_ja: AIエージェントは、新たな情報が到着するにつれてそれに適応する必要がある動的でオープンエンドな環境にますます導入されています。現実的なユースケースに対してこの能力を効率的に測定するために、私たちは現実世界のイベントが発生した順序で再生するグラウンデッドシミュレーションを構築することを提案します。

title: VGGT-Edit: Feed-forward Native 3D Scene Editing with Residual Field Prediction
content:
VGGT-Edit: Feed-forward Native 3D Scene Editing with Residual Field Prediction
High-quality 3D scene reconstruction has recently advanced toward generalizable feed-forward architectures, enabling the generation of complex environments in a single forward pass. However, despite their strong performance in static scene perception, these models remain limited in responding to dyn
author: Kaixin Zhu, Yiwen Tang, Yifan Yang
arxiv_summary: High-quality 3D scene reconstruction has recently advanced toward generalizable feed-forward architectures, enabling the generation of complex environments in a single forward pass. However, despite their strong performance in static scene perception, these models remain limited in responding to dyn
title_ja: VGGT-Edit: 残差場予測によるフィードフォワードネイティブ3Dシーン編集
arxiv_summary_ja: 高品質な3Dシーン再構築は、最近、汎用的なフィードフォワードアーキテクチャへと進化し、単一のフォワードパスで複雑な環境の生成を可能にしました。しかし、静的シーン認識における強力な性能にもかかわらず、これらのモデルは動的な変化に対応する能力において依然として限界があります。

title: Quantitative Video World Model Evaluation for Geometric-Consistency
content:
Quantitative Video World Model Evaluation for Geometric-Consistency
Generative video models are increasingly studied as implicit world models, yet evaluating whether they produce physically plausible 3D structure and motion remains challenging. Most existing video evaluation pipelines rely heavily on human judgment or learned graders, which can be subjective and wea
author: Jiaxin Wu, Yihao Pi, Yinling Zhang
arxiv_summary: Generative video models are increasingly studied as implicit world models, yet evaluating whether they produce physically plausible 3D structure and motion remains challenging. Most existing video evaluation pipelines rely heavily on human judgment or learned graders, which can be subjective and wea
title_ja: 幾何学的整合性のための定量的動画ワールドモデル評価
arxiv_summary_ja: 生成型動画モデルは暗黙的なワールドモデルとしてますます研究されていますが、物理的に妥当な3D構造と動きを生成するかどうかを評価することは依然として困難です。既存のほとんどの動画評価パイプラインは、人間の判断や学習された評価器に大きく依存しており、これらは主観的で不確実な可能性があります。

title: Eradicating Negative Transfer in Multi-Physics Foundation Models via Sparse Mixture-of-Experts Routing
content:
Eradicating Negative Transfer in Multi-Physics Foundation Models via Sparse Mixture-of-Experts Routing
Scaling Scientific Machine Learning (SciML) toward universal foundation models is bottlenecked by negative transfer: the simultaneous co-training of disparate partial differential equation (PDE) regimes can induce gradient conflict, unstable optimization, and plasticity loss in dense neural operator
author: Ellwil Sharma, Arastu Sharma
arxiv_summary: Scaling Scientific Machine Learning (SciML) toward universal foundation models is bottlenecked by negative transfer: the simultaneous co-training of disparate partial differential equation (PDE) regimes can induce gradient conflict, unstable optimization, and plasticity loss in dense neural operator
title_ja: スパースなMoEルーティングによる多物理基盤モデルにおける負の転移の根絶
arxiv_summary_ja: 科学的機械学習（SciML）を汎用的な基盤モデルへとスケールアップする際のボトルネックは、負の転移です。これは、異なる偏微分方程式（PDE）レジームを同時に共同学習させることで、勾配の衝突、不安定な最適化、密なニューラルオペレータにおける可塑性の喪失を引き起こす可能性があります。

title: OpenDeepThink: Parallel Reasoning via Bradley--Terry Aggregation
content:
OpenDeepThink: Parallel Reasoning via Bradley--Terry Aggregation
Test-time compute scaling is a primary axis for improving LLM reasoning. Existing methods primarily scale depth by extending a single reasoning trace. Scaling breadth by sampling multiple candidates in parallel is straightforward, but introduces a selection bottleneck: choosing the best candidate wi
author: Shang Zhou, Wenhao Chai, Kaiyuan Liu
arxiv_summary: Test-time compute scaling is a primary axis for improving LLM reasoning. Existing methods primarily scale depth by extending a single reasoning trace. Scaling breadth by sampling multiple candidates in parallel is straightforward, but introduces a selection bottleneck: choosing the best candidate wi
title_ja: OpenDeepThink: Bradley-Terry集計による並列推論
arxiv_summary_ja: テスト時の計算スケーリングは、LLM推論を改善するための主要な軸です。既存の手法は主に、単一の推論トレースを拡張することで深さをスケーリングします。複数の候補を並行してサンプリングすることで幅をスケーリングすることは簡単ですが、選択のボトルネックを導入します。それは、最適な候補を選択することです。

title: Evidential Reasoning Advances Interpretable Real-World Disease Screening
content:
Evidential Reasoning Advances Interpretable Real-World Disease Screening
Disease screening is critical for early detection and timely intervention in clinical practice. However, most current screening models for medical images suffer from limited interpretability and suboptimal performance. They often lack effective mechanisms to reference historical cases or provide tra
author: Chenyu Lian, Hong-Yu Zhou, Jing Qin
arxiv_summary: Disease screening is critical for early detection and timely intervention in clinical practice. However, most current screening models for medical images suffer from limited interpretability and suboptimal performance. They often lack effective mechanisms to reference historical cases or provide tra
title_ja: エビデンス推論が解釈可能な現実世界の疾病スクリーニングを前進させる
arxiv_summary_ja: 疾病スクリーニングは、臨床診療における早期発見とタイムリーな介入のために不可欠です。しかし、現在の医療画像向けスクリーニングモデルのほとんどは、解釈可能性が限られており、性能が最適ではありません。多くの場合、過去の症例を参照したり、透明性のある説明を提供したりするための効果的なメカニズムが欠けています。

title: Text Knows What, Tables Know When: Clinical Timeline Reconstruction via Retrieval-Augmented Multimodal Alignment
content:
Text Knows What, Tables Know When: Clinical Timeline Reconstruction via Retrieval-Augmented Multimodal Alignment
Reconstructing precise clinical timelines is essential for modeling patient trajectories and forecasting risk in complex, heterogeneous conditions like sepsis. While unstructured clinical narratives offer semantically rich and contextually complete descriptions of a patient's course, they often lack
author: Sayantan Kumar, Shahriar Noroozizadeh, Juyong Kim
arxiv_summary: Reconstructing precise clinical timelines is essential for modeling patient trajectories and forecasting risk in complex, heterogeneous conditions like sepsis. While unstructured clinical narratives offer semantically rich and contextually complete descriptions of a patient's course, they often lack
title_ja: テキストは何を知り、表はいつを知る：検索拡張マルチモーダルアラインメントによる臨床タイムライン再構築
arxiv_summary_ja: 正確な臨床タイムラインの再構築は、敗血症のような複雑で異質な病態における患者の軌跡をモデル化し、リスクを予測するために不可欠です。非構造化された臨床記述は、患者の経過に関する意味的に豊かで文脈的に完全な記述を提供しますが、しばしば不足しています。

title: Position: Behavioural Assurance Cannot Verify the Safety Claims Governance Now Demands
content:
Position: Behavioural Assurance Cannot Verify the Safety Claims Governance Now Demands
This position paper argues that behavioural assurance, even when carefully designed, is being asked to carry safety claims it cannot verify. AI governance frameworks enacted between 2019 and early 2026 require reviewable evidence of properties such as the absence of hidden objectives, resistance to
author: Pratinav Seth, Vinay Kumar Sankarapu
arxiv_summary: This position paper argues that behavioural assurance, even when carefully designed, is being asked to carry safety claims it cannot verify. AI governance frameworks enacted between 2019 and early 2026 require reviewable evidence of properties such as the absence of hidden objectives, resistance to
title_ja: 提言：行動的保証は、ガバナンスが現在要求する安全性の主張を検証できない
arxiv_summary_ja: 本提言書は、行動的保証は、たとえ慎重に設計されたとしても、検証できない安全性の主張を負うよう求められていると主張します。2019年から2026年初頭にかけて制定されたAIガバナンスフレームワークは、隠れた目的の不在、抵抗性などの特性に関する検証可能な証拠を要求します。

title: RefDecoder: Enhancing Visual Generation with Conditional Video Decoding
content:
RefDecoder: Enhancing Visual Generation with Conditional Video Decoding
Video generation powers a vast array of downstream applications. However, while the de facto standard, i.e., latent diffusion models, typically employ heavily conditioned denoising networks, their decoders often remain unconditional. We observe that this architectural asymmetry leads to significant
author: Xiang Fan, Yuheng Wang, Bohan Fang
arxiv_summary: Video generation powers a vast array of downstream applications. However, while the de facto standard, i.e., latent diffusion models, typically employ heavily conditioned denoising networks, their decoders often remain unconditional. We observe that this architectural asymmetry leads to significant
title_ja: RefDecoder: 条件付き動画デコーディングによる視覚生成の強化
arxiv_summary_ja: 動画生成は、幅広い下流アプリケーションを支えています。しかし、事実上の標準である潜在拡散モデルは通常、強く条件付けされたノイズ除去ネットワークを採用する一方で、そのデコーダはしばしば無条件のままです。このアーキテクチャの非対称性が重大な問題につながることを我々は観察しました。

title: When Are Two Networks the Same? Tensor Similarity for Mechanistic Interpretability
content:
When Are Two Networks the Same? Tensor Similarity for Mechanistic Interpretability
Mechanistic interpretability aims to break models into meaningful parts; verifying that two such parts implement the same computation is a prerequisite. Existing similarity measures evaluate either empirical behaviour, leaving them blind to out-of-distribution mechanisms, or basis-dependent paramete
author: ML Nissen Gonzalez, Melwina Albuquerque, Laurence Wroe
arxiv_summary: Mechanistic interpretability aims to break models into meaningful parts; verifying that two such parts implement the same computation is a prerequisite. Existing similarity measures evaluate either empirical behaviour, leaving them blind to out-of-distribution mechanisms, or basis-dependent paramete
title_ja: 二つのネットワークはいつ同じか？機械学習モデルの解釈可能性のためのテンソル類似度
arxiv_summary_ja: 機械論的解釈可能性は、モデルを有意義な部分に分解することを目指します。そのような二つの部分が同じ計算を実装していることを検証することは、前提条件です。既存の類似度尺度は、経験的挙動を評価するため、分布外のメカニズムには盲目であるか、または基底に依存するパラメータに焦点を当てています。

title: Hand-in-the-Loop: Improving Dexterous VLA via Seamless Interventional Correction
content:
Hand-in-the-Loop: Improving Dexterous VLA via Seamless Interventional Correction
Vision-Language-Action (VLA) models are prone to compounding errors in dexterous manipulation, where high-dimensional action spaces and contact-rich dynamics amplify small policy deviations over long horizons. While Interactive Imitation Learning (IIL) can refine policies through human takeover data
author: Zhuohang Li, Liqun Huang, Wei Xu
arxiv_summary: Vision-Language-Action (VLA) models are prone to compounding errors in dexterous manipulation, where high-dimensional action spaces and contact-rich dynamics amplify small policy deviations over long horizons. While Interactive Imitation Learning (IIL) can refine policies through human takeover data
title_ja: ハンドインザループ：シームレスな介入修正による器用なVLAの改善
arxiv_summary_ja: 視覚言語行動（VLA）モデルは、器用な操作において複合的な誤差を起こしやすく、高次元の行動空間と接触の多いダイナミクスが、長期間にわたるわずかなポリシー逸脱を増幅させます。対話型模倣学習（IIL）は、人間の介入データを通じてポリシーを洗練できますが、

title: MeMo: Memory as a Model
content:
MeMo: Memory as a Model
Large language models (LLMs) achieve strong performance across a wide range of tasks, but remain frozen after pretraining until subsequent updates. Many real-world applications require timely, domain-specific information, motivating the need for efficient mechanisms to incorporate new knowledge. In
author: Ryan Wei Heng Quek, Sanghyuk Lee, Alfred Wei Lun Leong
arxiv_summary: Large language models (LLMs) achieve strong performance across a wide range of tasks, but remain frozen after pretraining until subsequent updates. Many real-world applications require timely, domain-specific information, motivating the need for efficient mechanisms to incorporate new knowledge. In
title_ja: MeMo: モデルとしての記憶
arxiv_summary_ja: 大規模言語モデル（LLM）は、幅広いタスクで強力な性能を達成しますが、事前学習後はその後の更新まで凍結されたままです。多くの現実世界のアプリケーションでは、タイムリーなドメイン固有の情報が必要であり、新しい知識を組み込むための効率的なメカニズムの必要性が動機付けられています。

title: Self-Distilled Agentic Reinforcement Learning
content:
Self-Distilled Agentic Reinforcement Learning
Reinforcement learning (RL) has emerged as a central paradigm for post-training LLM agents, yet its trajectory-level reward signal provides only coarse supervision for long-horizon interaction. On-Policy Self-Distillation (OPSD) complements RL by introducing dense token-level guidance from a teacher
author: Zhengxi Lu, Zhiyuan Yao, Zhuowen Han
arxiv_summary: Reinforcement learning (RL) has emerged as a central paradigm for post-training LLM agents, yet its trajectory-level reward signal provides only coarse supervision for long-horizon interaction. On-Policy Self-Distillation (OPSD) complements RL by introducing dense token-level guidance from a teacher
title_ja: 自己蒸留型エージェント強化学習
arxiv_summary_ja: 強化学習（RL）は、LLMエージェントの後期学習における中心的なパラダイムとして浮上していますが、その軌跡レベルの報酬信号は、長期間の対話に対して粗い教師信号しか提供しません。オンポリシー自己蒸留（OPSD）は、教師モデルからの密なトークンレベルのガイダンスを導入することでRLを補完します。

title: Is Grep All You Need? How Agent Harnesses Reshape Agentic Search
content:
Is Grep All You Need? How Agent Harnesses Reshape Agentic Search
Recent advances in Large Language Model (LLM) agents have enabled complex agentic workflows where models autonomously retrieve information, call tools, and reason over large corpora to complete tasks on behalf of users. Despite the growing adoption of retrieval-augmented generation (RAG) in agentic
author: Sahil Sen, Akhil Kasturi, Elias Lumer
arxiv_summary: Recent advances in Large Language Model (LLM) agents have enabled complex agentic workflows where models autonomously retrieve information, call tools, and reason over large corpora to complete tasks on behalf of users. Despite the growing adoption of retrieval-augmented generation (RAG) in agentic
title_ja: Grepだけで十分か？エージェントハーネスがいかにエージェント的検索を再形成するか
arxiv_summary_ja: 大規模言語モデル（LLM）エージェントにおける最近の進歩は、モデルが自律的に情報を検索し、ツールを呼び出し、大規模なコーパス上で推論してユーザーに代わってタスクを完了する、複雑なエージェント的ワークフローを可能にしました。エージェント的コンテキストにおける検索拡張生成（RAG）の採用が増加しているにもかかわらず、

title: MetaBackdoor: Exploiting Positional Encoding as a Backdoor Attack Surface in LLMs
content:
MetaBackdoor: Exploiting Positional Encoding as a Backdoor Attack Surface in LLMs
Backdoor attacks pose a serious security threat to large language models (LLMs), which are increasingly deployed as general-purpose assistants in safety- and privacy-critical applications. Existing LLM backdoors rely primarily on content-based triggers, requiring explicit modification of the input t
author: Rui Wen, Mark Russinovich, Andrew Paverd
arxiv_summary: Backdoor attacks pose a serious security threat to large language models (LLMs), which are increasingly deployed as general-purpose assistants in safety- and privacy-critical applications. Existing LLM backdoors rely primarily on content-based triggers, requiring explicit modification of the input t
title_ja: MetaBackdoor: LLMにおけるバックドア攻撃表面としての位置エンコーディングの悪用
arxiv_summary_ja: バックドア攻撃は、安全性とプライバシーが重要なアプリケーションで汎用アシスタントとしてますます展開されている大規模言語モデル（LLM）にとって深刻なセキュリティ上の脅威をもたらします。既存のLLMバックドアは主にコンテンツベースのトリガーに依存しており、入力の明示的な変更を必要とします。

title: Forgetting That Sticks: Quantization-Permanent Unlearning via Circuit Attribution
content:
Forgetting That Sticks: Quantization-Permanent Unlearning via Circuit Attribution
Standard unlearning evaluations measure behavioral suppression in full precision, immediately after training, despite every deployed language model being quantized first. Recent work has shown that 4-bit post-training quantization can reverse machine unlearning; we show this is not a tuning artefact
author: Saisab Sadhu, Pratinav Seth, Vinay Kumar Sankarapu
arxiv_summary: Standard unlearning evaluations measure behavioral suppression in full precision, immediately after training, despite every deployed language model being quantized first. Recent work has shown that 4-bit post-training quantization can reverse machine unlearning; we show this is not a tuning artefact
title_ja: 定着する忘却：回路帰属による量子化永続的なアンラーニング
arxiv_summary_ja: 標準的なアンラーニング評価は、展開されるすべての言語モデルが最初に量子化されるにもかかわらず、トレーニング直後のフル精度での行動抑制を測定します。最近の研究では、4ビットの事後学習量子化が機械的なアンラーニングを逆転させることが示されました。我々はこれがチューニングの成果ではないことを示します。

title: MemEye: A Visual-Centric Evaluation Framework for Multimodal Agent Memory
content:
MemEye: A Visual-Centric Evaluation Framework for Multimodal Agent Memory
Long-term agent memory is increasingly multimodal, yet existing evaluations rarely test whether agents preserve the visual evidence needed for later reasoning. In prior work, many visually grounded questions can be answered using only captions or textual traces, allowing answers to be inferred witho
author: Minghao Guo, Qingyue Jiao, Zeru Shi
arxiv_summary: Long-term agent memory is increasingly multimodal, yet existing evaluations rarely test whether agents preserve the visual evidence needed for later reasoning. In prior work, many visually grounded questions can be answered using only captions or textual traces, allowing answers to be inferred witho
title_ja: MemEye: マルチモーダルエージェントメモリのための視覚中心評価フレームワーク
arxiv_summary_ja: エージェントの長期記憶はますますマルチモーダルになっていますが、既存の評価は、エージェントが後の推論に必要な視覚的証拠を保持しているかどうかをほとんどテストしていません。先行研究では、多くの視覚的に根拠のある質問は、キャプションやテキストのトレースのみを使用して回答できるため、推論なしで回答を導き出すことができます。

title: Talk is (Not) Cheap: A Taxonomy and Benchmark Coverage Audit for LLM Attacks
content:
Talk is (Not) Cheap: A Taxonomy and Benchmark Coverage Audit for LLM Attacks
We introduce a reusable framework for auditing whether LLM attack benchmarks collectively cover the threat surface: a 4$\times$6 Target $\times$ Technique matrix grounded in STRIDE, constructed from a 507-leaf taxonomy -- 401 data-populated and 106 threat-model-derived leaves -- of inference-time at
author: Karthik Raghu Iyer, Yazdan Jamshidi, Nicholas Bray
arxiv_summary: We introduce a reusable framework for auditing whether LLM attack benchmarks collectively cover the threat surface: a 4$\times$6 Target $\times$ Technique matrix grounded in STRIDE, constructed from a 507-leaf taxonomy -- 401 data-populated and 106 threat-model-derived leaves -- of inference-time at
title_ja: 話は（安く）ない：LLM攻撃の分類法とベンチマーク網羅性監査
arxiv_summary_ja: 私たちは、LLM攻撃ベンチマークが脅威の表面を包括的にカバーしているかどうかを監査するための再利用可能なフレームワークを導入します。これは、STRIDEに基づいて構築された4×6のターゲット×テクニックマトリックスであり、507の葉を持つ分類法（401のデータで埋められた葉と106の脅威モデルから導き出された葉）から構築されています。この分類法は、推論時の攻撃に関するものです。
